productDisplayName: Puma Men Striped Full Zip Red Sweaters
description: Composition Red and black striped round neck sweater made of 100% cotton, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, mock neck with zippered placket, embroidered branding on left chest, two pockets on the sides and has a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry Flaunt your love for simplicity and minimalism with this knit sweater from puma. The full sleeves and pure cotton fabric are sure to keep the winter chill at bay. Team this with jeans and casual shoes for a cool, casual look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
